description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:9 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory, with a before_script that runs npm install before each job. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test-stage job named npm_test that executes the command echo Running test. Add a deploy-stage job named release that runs only on the master branch, writes an .npmrc file containing the NPM_TOKEN secret, runs npm publish, and then removes the .npmrc file. Ensure the pipeline respects the cache and stage ordering as described.
